sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint names identity and destination confidence but does not serialize durable assessment rows.
decisionTaken: Published TelephonyIdentityConfidenceAssessment and TelephonyDestinationConfidenceAssessment as first-class immutable contracts and persistence tables.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The blueprint requires P_id, LCB/UCB, runner-up, gap_id, z_dest, P_dest, and LCB_dest_alpha to be auditable and reusable by continuation without recomputing transient DTOs.
operationalRisk: If future adjudication changes assessment granularity, older assessment refs remain immutable and new schema versions can be added.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add a v2 assessment schema and migration rather than mutating v1 fields.
